scripts.electron:build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && electron-builder && rm -rf G-Attendance.app && cp -R dist-electron/mac-arm64/G-Attendance.app ./
scripts.build:backend: rm -rf dist-backend build/app && pyinstaller --distpath dist-backend --name app --onedir -y app.py --hidden-import=services --hidden-import=api --hidden-import=api.team --hidden-import=api.leave --hidden-import=api.holidays --hidden-import=api.balances --hidden-import=api.config --hidden-import=services.excel_service
